behaviors.reasoning: Blocking contradictory PASS summaries requires joining summary input with stored finding metadata in application logic.
Computing gate verdict from stored findings is deterministic data-flow logic across internal modules.
Override flags plus audit logging are cross-module policy checks; pure unit tests are too narrow.
Requiring a fresh review-agent rerun is an AI agentic workflow constraint across multiple review-loop steps.
Escalation behavior depends on multi-step review lifecycle state, including unresolved findings after iterative agent runs.
